notes: A synthetic 10-K cover page for Phoenix Data Systems, Inc. with heavy markdown rendering noise: escaped asterisks, strikethrough of stale values alongside live values (old company name, old address, old date crossed out with new values alongside), HTML-style table bracket artifacts, and commented-out document-boundary markers. Tests that the extractor ignores struck-through stale values and resolves the correct current values. Expects filer_name, form_type, period_fiscal_year_end, and filing_date from the non-struck-through content.
